757 GG0130A5_SELF_CARE_EATG_CD GG0130A5_SELF_CARE_EATG_CD GG0130A5 Self Care: Eating Ability (Interim Perf) CHAR 2 Eating: The ability to use suitable utensils to bring food and/or liquid to the mouth and swallow food and/or liquid once the meal is placed before the resident. effective 10/01/2019
